backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining user profile types (Grade, Stream, EducationalSystem) and functions to create and retrieve user profiles with validation for grade-stream requirements (grades 11-12 require stream selection).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including welcome screen, onboarding flow, subject generation, energy meter gamification, and their associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, hooks, utilities, and components describing their functionality and implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like background, foreground, primary, secondary, borders, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component configuring TanStack Router with all application routes (welcome, onboarding, dashboard, quiz, shop, resources, tools, analytics, olympiad, minigames, parent portal, settings) and ThemeProvider with Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard/Achiev: Card component displaying a grid of achievement badges with tooltips, showing locked/unlocked states using grayscale filter for locked badges.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard/Contin: Card component with gradient background showing AI-suggested learning continuation, featuring a button that navigates to the mathematics quiz.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard/DailyG: Card component displaying daily question-answering progress with a progress bar showing completion toward a goal of 20 questions.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard/Energy: Card component displaying current energy level with progress bar and animated Zap icon, using the useEnergy hook to track energy state.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard/Motiva: Card component displaying a randomly selected motivational quote about learning with author attribution on a gradient background.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard/Quests: Displays a card with daily quests showing progress bars, completion status icons, and energy rewards for tasks like answering questions and completing quizzes.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard/Streak: Shows a gradient card displaying the user's daily streak count with a flame icon, updating the streak on mount using the useStreak hook.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard/Subjec: Renders a clickable card for a subject with icon, name, mastery progress bar, and navigates to the quiz page for that subject on click.
Displays a grid of subject cards generated based on the user's grade and stream from their profile.
frontend/src/components/Layout/AppLayout: Main layout component that wraps children with a sidebar and header in a flex container structure.
frontend/src/components/Navigation/Heade: Top navigation bar with mobile menu button, dark mode toggle, user avatar, and logout button for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/Navigation/Sideb: Left sidebar navigation with BrainBox logo and menu items for dashboard, resources, shop, games, tools, analytics, olympiad, parent portal, and settings.
frontend/src/components/Olympiad/Olympia: Promotional banner card with gradient background encouraging users to take olympiad diagnostic quiz, with navigation to olympiad page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useEnergy.ts: Zustand store with persistence for managing user energy points, providing functions to add, spend, and reset energy.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file for React Query hooks; currently empty with user profile operations handled separately in useUserProfile.ts.
frontend/src/hooks/useStreak.ts: Zustand store with persistence tracking daily login streaks, comparing visit dates to increment or reset the streak counter.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and creating user profiles with grade, educational system, and stream using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color variables for light/dark themes (electric blue, lightning yellow, purple) and custom animations (fade-in, slide-up, float).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the App component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsDashboard.ts: Displays a performance analytics dashboard with static metric cards (accuracy, study time, improvement, questions answered) and a placeholder for future detailed analytics features.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page that displays user profile, energy meter, streak counter, daily goals, subject grid, quests panel, achievements, and an olympiad banner with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/EnergyShop.tsx: Shop interface where users can spend energy to unlock mini-games, displaying purchasable items with costs and handling purchase transactions with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/MiniGamesHub.tsx: Displays a grid of educational mini-games (Word Rush, Math Blaster, etc.) with locked/unlocked states, currently all games are locked by default.
frontend/src/pages/OlympiadHub.tsx: Landing page for olympiad preparation featuring information about academic competitions and a call-to-action for a diagnostic quiz to assess student level.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingFlow.tsx: Multi-step onboarding wizard that collects user grade, educational system, and stream (for grades 11-12), then creates a user profile and navigates to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/ParentPortal.tsx: Parent-facing portal with placeholder cards for progress reports, screen time management, and parental controls features.
frontend/src/pages/QuizView.tsx: Placeholder page for quiz functionality with a back button to dashboard and a 'coming soon' message.
frontend/src/pages/ResourcesHub.tsx: Tabbed interface for learning resources (notes, flashcards, summaries, videos) with all tabs showing 'coming soon' placeholder content.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page component with three card sections for audio settings (background music, volume, sound effects), accessibility options (text-to-speech, dyslexia font, font size), and learning preferences (offline mode, low data mode).
frontend/src/pages/ToolsHub.tsx: Learning tools hub page displaying four placeholder cards for upcoming features: Timetable Planner, Exam Countdown, Goal Setting, and Homework Reminders.
frontend/src/pages/WelcomeScreen.tsx: Animated welcome screen with gradient background, hero image, BrainBox branding with brain and lightning icons, tagline, and a CTA button navigating to onboarding with floating particle effects.
frontend/src/utils/subjectGenerator.ts: Utility function that generates grade-appropriate subject lists with icons and colors based on grade level (1-5, 6-8, 9-10, 11-12) and stream selection (Science, Commerce, Humanities) for grades 11-12.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with brand colors (electric-blue, lightning-yellow, brain-purple, energy-orange), custom animations, and plugin integrations for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document defining BrainBox as a gamified educational app for grades 1-12 with multi-board support, energy meter system, adaptive learning, offline-first architecture, and detailed image requirements for UI assets.
